settings.title: Refund Policy
settings.content:
9skin does not have a refundable policy Unless otherwise:

  • Products purchased directly from 9skin website were incorrectly sent or are defective.

Given such, customers are to notify 9Skin within 14 days for incorrectly sent products, or 7 days for defective products, from the date of purchase. If an exchange is not feasible, 9skin may issue (i) a credit for the amount of the exchanged products, which may be used to purchase other products.
